events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess hazard: pressure testing commercial project, test blinds missing/not rated, work in-progress. Need identify safety hazards severity immediate controls. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high/critical? Missing or not rated test blinds during pressure test can lead to catastrophic failure, blinds not rated for test pressure can blow out, injury/death. Severity critical maybe. Need component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 60? value not asked 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty. workable empty. findings: test blinds missing or not rated; unable to isolate equipment/components; risk of uncontrolled release. actions: stop test, install correct rated blinds per spec/ASME B31.3, verify ratings and tags, inspect, re-pressurize only after approval. references ASME B31.3 §345. Need ensure JSON valid.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 1.0,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Test blinds are missing or not rated for the test pressure.",
    "Unrated or absent blinds cannot safely isolate piping/equipment during the pressure test.",
    "Risk of blind failure and sudden, uncontrolled release of pressurized fluid or energy."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop the pressure test and depressurize the system.",
    "Install properly rated, identified, and inspected test blinds at all required isolation points.",
    "Verify blind ratings against the test pressure and applicable submittals before reassembly.",
    "Have a qualified inspector review blind installation and documentation prior to re-pressurization.",
    "Re-pressurize only after written approval and in accordance with the approved test plan."
  ],
  "rationale": "ASME B31.3 §345 requires pressure testing to be performed with adequate, rated isolation. Missing or unrated test blinds create a critical hazard because they can fail under test pressure, leading to an uncontrolled release capable of causing serious injury or fatality. The test must be stopped until proper rated blinds are installed and verified.",
  "references": ["ASME B31.3 §345"]
}
